subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Thou Whose mercy hath surpassed all things, Whose bounty hath been perfected upon all things, and Whose proof hath been completed unto Thy servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا من سبقت رحمته کل شیء و کملت نعمته علی کل شیء و تمت حجته علی عباده
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @soul; spirit after death, @prayer for the departed, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @eulogies; reminiscences
